narrative:
Camp Creek Twp (precinct in Pike County) has 621 registered voters, with 63.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points.
